/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/game_bot.dir/bot_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_bot.dir/bot_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game_bot.dir/bot_manager.cpp.o -o game_bot  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../src/libgame_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libprotobuf.so /usr/local/lib/libboost_system.so.1.79.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_strings.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_strings_internal.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_base.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_spinlock_wait.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_int128.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_throw_delegate.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_raw_logging_internal.so.20210324.0.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libabsl_log_severity.so.20210324.0.0 -Wl,--push-state,--as-needed -latomic -Wl,--pop-state
